sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Excellent! Now I see something very interesting! When I rotated the frame (LEFT) and pressed SPACE:
- The frame block is a diamond (purple)
- The lower block is now split diagonally: purple-top-left/white-bottom-right
So the rotation of the frame block affects the stamp pattern! When the frame is a rectangle, SPACE stamps horizontally (top half). When the frame is a diamond (rotated), SPACE stamps diagonally!
This means:
- Rectangle frame + SPACE → horizontal split stamp
- Diamond frame + SPACE → diagonal split stamp
The template shows white-top/purple-bottom (horizontal split). So I need:
1. Rectangle frame (not diamond)
2. Select the right colors and stamp in the right order
Let me think about the stamping mechanic more carefully:
- Rectangle frame, SPACE with purple on white → purple-top/white-bottom (horizontal)
- Diamond frame, SPACE with purple on white → purple-top-left/white-bottom-right (diagonal)
To get white-top/purple-bottom:
1. Start with solid purple lower block
2. Stamp white on top (rectangle frame, white selected)
But I can't make the lower block solid purple because SPACE only stamps half...
Wait, let me think again. What if I:
1. Diamond frame, purple selected, SPACE on white → diagonal purple/white
2. Then rectangle frame, purple selected, SPACE → ?
Or maybe I should try:
1. Rectangle frame, purple selected, SPACE → purple-top/white-bottom
2. Diamond frame, purple selected, SPACE → ?
Let me try option 2: current state is diamond frame, diagonal lower block. Let me rotate back to rectangle and SPACE with purple.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Diamond frame + SPACE gave diagonal split!
# Current: frame=diamond(purple), lower=diagonal(purple-top-left/white-bottom-right)
# Let me rotate back to rectangle and SPACE with purple to see the effect
action(['RIGHT', 'SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
